events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to identify the component or condition: "CSST gas line not bonded". The work is rough-complete. The scenario says: "CSST gas line not bonded". That is a defect. According to NEC 250.104, bonding of gas piping is required. CSST (corrugated stainless steel tubing) must be bonded per manufacturer instructions and NEC. So this is a non-compliant condition. The component condition is "installed-defective" because it's installed but not bonded. Also "non-compliant". The decision should be "fail" because it's dangerous (risk of arcing from lightning or electrical faults). Risk: high or critical? CSST not bonded can lead to fire from lightning, so critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But bonding is missing, so not fully complete. I'll estimate 85%? But the task says "roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out". So maybe 80%? I'll put 85. Value: none. Sound source: none. Confidence: high, 0.95. Event time: 0. Rate: 0. Order: empty. Workable: maybe "bond CSST gas line" but not an activity ID. I'll leave empty. Findings: "CSST gas line not bonded, violating NEC 250.104". Actions: "Immediately bond CSST gas line per NEC 250.104 and manufacturer instructions". Rationale: "CSST gas piping must be bonded to the electrical grounding system to prevent arcing from lightning or electrical faults, as required by NEC 250.104." References: ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]. Note: 250.30 is about grounding separately derived systems, maybe not directly relevant, but it's in the reference material. I'll include both. So JSON.
